title: Purpose
doc_html:
§1162. Purpose

            The purpose of this Subpart is to provide for transparency of the expenditures of dental healthcare service plan premiums and to require annual reports.

            Acts 2024, No. 357, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2025.
doc_text:
§1162.  Purpose
The purpose of this Subpart is to provide for transparency of the expenditures of
dental healthcare service plan premiums and to require annual reports.
Acts 2024, No. 357, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2025.
